<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>节日营销 · AI 出图 Prompt 生成器 | 商家版</title>
<style>
  :root{ --tt-black:#000; --tt-red:#FE2C55; --tt-cyan:#25F4EE; --bg:#f4f4f5; --card:#fff; --line:#ececec; --txt:#161823; --sub:#8a8b91; }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
  body{font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI","PingFang SC","Microsoft YaHei",sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);}
  /* ===== 登录页 ===== */
  #login{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#161823 0%,#2a0a14 100%);padding:20px;}
  .login-card{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:38px 32px;width:100%;max-width:380px;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}
  .login-logo{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:14px;background:var(--tt-black);position:relative;margin:0 auto 18px;}
  .login-logo::before{content:"♪";color:var(--tt-cyan);position:absolute;font-size:32px;left:13px;top:6px;text-shadow:3px 0 var(--tt-red);}
  .login-card h2{text-align:center;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;}
  .login-card .lsub{text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:26px;line-height:1.5;}
  .login-card label{display:block;font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);font-weight:600;margin:14px 0 6px;}
  .login-card input{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;font-size:14px;outline:none;font-family:inherit;}
  .login-card input:focus{border-color:var(--tt-black);}
  .login-btn{width:100%;margin-top:24px;padding:13px;background:var(--tt-red);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:30px;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;}
  .login-btn:disabled{background:#f0a8b6;cursor:wait;}
  .lerr{color:var(--tt-red);font-size:13px;text-align:center;margin-top:14px;min-height:18px;font-weight:600;}
  .lfoot{text-align:center;font-size:11px;color:#bbb;margin-top:22px;line-height:1.5;}
  /* ===== 工具页（内层注入后用） ===== */
  #app{display:none;padding:24px 16px 90px;}
  .wrap{max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;}
  .hd{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .hd .logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--tt-black);position:relative;flex:none;}
  .hd .logo::before{content:"♪";color:var(--tt-cyan);position:absolute;font-size:24px;left:9px;top:4px;text-shadow:2px 0 var(--tt-red);}
  .hd h1{font-size:21px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.3px;}
  .hd .tag{font-size:12px;color:#fff;background:var(--tt-red);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;font-weight:700;}
  .logout-btn{margin-left:auto;font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);background:#f0f0f1;border:none;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
  .sub{color:var(--sub);font-size:13px;margin:2px 0 22px 52px;}
  .card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:20px;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.04);}
  .sec-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
  .sec-title .n{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--tt-black);color:#fff;font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;}
  .sec-title .req{color:var(--tt-red);font-size:12px;}
  .sec-title .opt{color:var(--sub);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;}
  .sec-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);margin:0 0 14px 30px;}
  .q-tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .q-tab{padding:6px 14px;border-radius:20px;background:#f0f0f1;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid transparent;}
  .q-tab.active{background:var(--tt-black);color:#fff;}
  .fest-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;}
  .fest{border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:11px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;background:#fff;}
  .fest:hover{border-color:#ccc;transform:translateY(-1px);}
  .fest.sel{border-color:var(--tt-red);background:#fff4f6;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(254,44,85,.08);}
  .fest .cn{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;}
  .fest .en{font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);margin-top:1px;}
  .fest .dt{font-size:11px;color:var(--tt-red);margin-top:5px;font-weight:600;}
  .fest .rg{font-size:10px;color:var(--sub);margin-top:3px;line-height:1.3;}
  .chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
  .chip{padding:6px 12px;border-radius:18px;background:#f0f0f1;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;border:1.5px solid transparent;user-select:none;}
  .chip.sel{background:var(--tt-black);color:#fff;}
  .chip.add{background:#fff;border:1.5px dashed #ccc;color:var(--sub);}
  .empty{font-size:13px;color:var(--sub);font-style:italic;}
  .form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;}
  .form-opt{border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:13px;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;transition:.15s;}
  .form-opt.sel{border-color:var(--tt-red);background:#fff4f6;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(254,44,85,.08);}
  .form-opt .t{font-weight:700;font-size:14px;}
  .form-opt .d{font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.4;}
  input,select{font-family:inherit;font-size:13px;padding:9px 12px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;outline:none;width:100%;}
  input:focus{border-color:var(--tt-black);}
  .row{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;} .row > div{flex:1;}
  .lbl{font-size:12px;color:var(--sub);margin-bottom:5px;font-weight:600;}
  .gen-bar{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:#fff;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding:14px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;z-index:50;box-shadow:0 -2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.05);}
  .btn{padding:13px 30px;border-radius:30px;border:none;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;}
  .btn-primary{background:var(--tt-red);color:#fff;} .btn-primary:disabled{background:#f0a8b6;cursor:not-allowed;}
  .btn-ghost{background:#f0f0f1;color:var(--txt);}
  .add-inp{margin-top:10px;}
  .num-pick{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .num{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;}
  .num.sel{background:var(--tt-black);color:#fff;border-color:var(--tt-black);}
  /* 变体输出框 */
  .vbox{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-top:12px;background:#fafafa;}
  .vhead{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .vt{font-weight:800;font-size:13px;}
  .cp{font-size:12px;background:var(--tt-black);color:#fff;border:none;padding:5px 14px;border-radius:16px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;}
  .vlbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--sub);font-weight:700;margin:8px 0 3px;}
  .vp{font-size:13px;line-height:1.6;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 11px;}
  .vp.en{font-family:"SF Mono",Consolas,monospace;font-size:12px;color:#333;}
  .vr{font-size:11px;color:var(--tt-red);font-weight:600;margin-top:8px;}
  /* v2: 主 Tab + 商品模块 */
  .main-tabs{display:flex;gap:8px;margin:18px 0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .main-tab{flex:1;min-width:140px;text-align:center;padding:12px;border-radius:14px;background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--line);font-size:14px;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;}
  .main-tab.active{background:var(--tt-black);color:#fff;border-color:var(--tt-black);}
  .genrow{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin:20px 0 10px;}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ===== 登录门 ===== -->
<div id="login">
  <div class="login-card">
    <div class="login-logo"></div>
    <h2>节日营销 · AI 出图工具</h2>
    <div class="lsub">商家专属 Prompt 生成器<br>请输入买手提供的账号与密码</div>
    <label>账号</label>
    <input id="u" autocomplete="off" placeholder="请输入账号">
    <label>密码</label>
    <input id="p" type="password" placeholder="请输入密码" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')doLogin()">
    <button class="login-btn" id="loginBtn" onclick="doLogin()">登 录</button>
    <div class="lerr" id="lerr"></div>
    <div class="lfoot">本工具仅供合作商家使用，请勿外传账号密码</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ===== 工具容器（解密后注入） ===== -->
<div id="app"></div>

<script>
const PAYLOAD = {"salt": "Il9B+T6rlPN9HmAE2L4rOA==", "iv": "SsJPmV/UUwbXMOmy", "ct": "", "iter": 250000, "user": "seller"};
const SS_KEY = "fest_portal_auth";

function b64d(s){ return Uint8Array.from(atob(s), c=>c.charCodeAt(0)); }

async function deriveKey(user, pass, salt, iter){
  const enc = new TextEncoder();
  const base = await crypto.subtle.importKey("raw", enc.encode(user+":"+pass), {name:"PBKDF2"}, false, ["deriveKey"]);
  return crypto.subtle.deriveKey(
    {name:"PBKDF2", salt:salt, iterations:iter, hash:"SHA-256"},
    base, {name:"AES-GCM", length:256}, false, ["decrypt"]
  );
}

async function tryUnlock(user, pass){
  const salt=b64d(PAYLOAD.salt), iv=b64d(PAYLOAD.iv), ct=b64d(PAYLOAD.ct);
  const key=await deriveKey(user, pass, salt, PAYLOAD.iter);
  const plain=await crypto.subtle.decrypt({name:"AES-GCM", iv:iv}, key, ct); // 密码错→抛异常
  return new TextDecoder().decode(plain);
}

function mountApp(html){
  const app=document.getElementById('app');
  app.innerHTML=html;
  document.getElementById('login').style.display='none';
  app.style.display='block';
  // 执行注入的 <script>
  app.querySelectorAll('script').forEach(old=>{
    const s=document.createElement('script');
    s.textContent=old.textContent;
    document.body.appendChild(s);
  });
}

async function doLogin(){
  const u=document.getElementById('u').value.trim();
  const p=document.getElementById('p').value;
  const err=document.getElementById('lerr');
  const btn=document.getElementById('loginBtn');
  err.textContent=""; btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent="验证中…";
  // 用户名先做一次提示性校验（真正门槛是密码派生密钥）
  if(u!==PAYLOAD.user){ err.textContent="账号或密码错误"; btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="登 录"; return; }
  try{
    const html=await tryUnlock(u,p);
    sessionStorage.setItem(SS_KEY, JSON.stringify({u:u,p:p}));
    mountApp(html);
  }catch(e){
    err.textContent="账号或密码错误";
    btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent="登 录";
  }
}
function doLogout(){ sessionStorage.removeItem(SS_KEY); location.reload(); }

/* 会话内免重复登录 */
(async function(){
  const saved=sessionStorage.getItem(SS_KEY);
  if(saved){ try{ const {u,p}=JSON.parse(saved); const html=await tryUnlock(u,p); mountApp(html); }catch(e){ sessionStorage.removeItem(SS_KEY); } }
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
